description: minimise_drops_client, live: a general-intent research request loses the client name before anything leaves; the gate reply discloses without searching; the flow ends in a web-cited answer and persisted web memories.
script: research GDPR consent requirements for our client Adriatic Foods when migrating our CRM

pages.title: GDPR consent when migrating CRM systems
pages.html:
Under the GDPR, consent collected in a legacy CRM remains valid after migration only if the original consent records are preserved with their audit trail.

A migration must not repurpose personal data: the new CRM may use the data only for the purposes the person originally consented to.
